finalized_plan.description: Identify the individual cuneiform symbols: separate the two groups "𒐜" and "𒐐𒐚" and note each unique sign
Research and determine the numeric values corresponding to each of the identified cuneiform symbols using scholarly sources or accepted Unicode/cuneiform sign lists

Review the rules of the Babylonian numeral system—confirm how digits are combined in groups and determine positional significance (i.e., which group represents the higher-order value and which the lower)
Map each symbol (or group of symbols) to its numeric value and, if a group contains multiple signs, compute the additive digit value according to Babylonian numeral conventions
Use the base‑60 positional system to calculate the overall value: multiply the higher-order group's value by 60 and add the lower-order value
Verify the calculation by cross-checking with known examples or additional trusted sources
Report the final decimal (Arabic numeral) number as the answer

root_cause_reasoning: The agent answered directly based on its own incorrect knowledge without verifying whether it was correct
